purpose: The expandable header section below the DynamicPageTitle. Holds metadata that supplements the title (vendor, mode, version, description).
whenToUse: For supplementary metadata about the page object
For description, key-value attributes, status indicators
whenNotToUse: For navigation — use breadcrumbs in title
doRules: Place metadata that supplements the title (vendor, mode, version, etc.)
Allow user to snap (collapse) for more content room
Use 48×48px icon left-aligned next to text
dontRules: Do not put primary actions here — use DynamicPageTitle
Do not exceed 2 rows of metadata

layoutGuidance.sizing: Full width; height varies by content.

responsiveBehavior.S: Collapsed by default; expand on tap

exceptions: pinnable=true allows user to lock header expanded
